widgets.title: Geographic Distribution by Latitude
widgets.description: Bubble map showing the count of real estate listings aggregated by latitude and longitude, sized by the number of listings at each location.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "latitude" AS lat, "longitude" AS lon, CONCAT("city", ', ', "state") AS label, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY lat, lon, label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Price Per Sqft Usd by City
widgets.description: Average price per square foot in USD for properties grouped by city.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "city" AS label, AVG(CAST("price_per_sqft_usd" AS DOUBLE)) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY "city" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Total Price Per Sqft Usd
widgets.description: Average price per square foot in USD for all listings
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Average Price Per Sqft USD' AS label, CAST(AVG("price_per_sqft_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_real_estate" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: City Composition by State
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the count of listings per city grouped by state.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "state" AS label, "city" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Price Reduced Count Volume Over Listed Date
widgets.description: Shows the total price reduced count aggregated by month of the listing date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "listed_date")::VARCHAR AS x, CAST(SUM("price_reduced_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: City Ranked by Price Reduced Count
widgets.description: Total price reduced count aggregated by city, showing cities with the highest number of price reductions.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "city" AS label, CAST(SUM("price_reduced_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY "city" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by City
widgets.description: Comparison of average price per sqft, average days on market, average bedrooms, and average bathrooms across top 12 cities by listing count.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "city" AS axis, CAST(AVG("price_per_sqft_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY "city" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Price Per Sqft Usd vs Price Reduced Count by City
widgets.description: Comparison of average price per square foot and average price reduced count for properties grouped by city.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "city" AS label, AVG(CAST("price_per_sqft_usd" AS DOUBLE)) AS value1, AVG(CAST("price_reduced_count" AS DOUBLE)) AS value2 FROM "t_real_estate" GROUP BY "city" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20
